rootCause: The metrics loader used a dynamic import with /* @vite-ignore */ on the bare module specifier 'prom-client'. Vite/Rollup could not statically resolve the dependency during Astro builds used by Playwright setup, causing build failures before E2E could run.
resolution: Removed the Vite ignore directive so bundlers can resolve prom-client at build time while keeping the runtime fallback path in initMetrics for environments where metrics collection is unavailable.
